name: Annie Mae Jones' Old-Fashioned Chicken Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the frying fat from the pan, then replace it with melted butter and stir in the flour until bubbly.
2. Stir in the chicken stock and light cream. Cook until the sauce thickens.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Serve the sauce separately so that guests can spoon over their chicken pieces at the table.
